user.title: Connect to ElevenLabs
user.description: Enter your ElevenLabs API key. You can find it at https://elevenlabs.io/app/settings/api-keys

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with ElevenLabs
reauth_confirm.description: Your ElevenLabs API key is invalid or has been revoked. Enter a new API key.

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key — please check and try again
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to ElevenLabs. Please try again.

init.title: ElevenLabs Usage Options
init.description: Configure the polling interval. The ElevenLabs API has rate limits, so avoid setting this too low.
